name: Corned Beef Hash Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corned beef hash, egg, and catsup in a bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Grease a 9-inch square pan and line the bottom and sides with the mixture.
4. Spread the vegetables (peas or corn) on top of the layer.
5. In a saucepan, combine the cheese, milk, and mustard. Heat until everything is well blended.
6. Pour the heated cheese mixture over the meat-vegetable mix in the pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
